name: synthclaw-coagent
description: SynthClaw CoAgent — Personal AI Agent (CLI in ./cli)

scripts.build: cd cli && npm install && npm run build
scripts.link: cd cli && npm install && npm run build && npm link
scripts.start: cd cli && npm run build && npm link && node -e "console.log('synthclaw command ready')"
scripts.setup: cd cli && npm install && npm run build && npm link
